title: Audit Cum Tax Senior
description:
Are you thinking about improving your personal brand as an accounting professional? Be part of an environment that provides you with limitless opportunities.

Widely recognised as a Leader of Transformation in the accounting industry, Precursor is one of the top 25 accounting firms in Singapore offering audit, tax, accounting and advisory services to over 700 local and multinational enterprises across diverse industries.

Our commitment to quality and innovation excellence has earned us many accolades, including the Best Practice Award in 2018 and the Innovation Award in 2016 at the Singapore Accountancy Awards. Our relentless pursuit of Business Excellence in People Development made us the only accounting firm to be accredited as a People Developer by Enterprise Singapore.

We always put our people first and strive to serve every client with distinction. Our engagement with every client represents the start of a long-lasting relationship, through which we firmly hold on to our values of Mutual Respect, Integrity, Commitment and Excellence.

Check out all the milestones we have reached over the years: https://www.precursor.com.sg/en/aboutprecursor/our-milestones/

What are you waiting for? Come join our inspiring journey!

JOB SCOPE

  • Perform assurance activities and document audit procedures in accordance with professional standards
  • Manage time and multiple engagements effectively
  • Prepare statutory tax filings and identify developments that impact tax compliance
  • Provide timely and excellent services to clients
  • Develop and understanding of the client's business and understand client specific needs

REQUIREMENTS

  • Min Degree in accountancy or equivalent
  • At least 3 to 4 years of audit experience
  • No experience is welcome to apply

postedCompany.description:
PRECURSOR ASSURANCE LLP

Precursor is one of the top 25 accounting firms in Singapore and an Accredited Training Organisation (ATO) by the Singapore Accountancy Commission (SAC). As an ATO, we are recognised as having the appropriate working environment and mentoring support for staff who wish to undertake the Singapore QP.

 

We provide a full suite of corporate and advisory solutions and services to more than 600 local and overseas enterprises. Our commitment towards quality and innovation excellence has won us many accolades, including Winner of Best Practice Award in 2018 and Innovation Award in 2016 during the Singapore Accountancy Awards. We are also accredited as People Developer by Enterprise Singapore for our relentless drive towards People Development. Precursor strives to serve every client with distinction. Our engagement with every client represents the start of a long lasting relationship, through which we firmly hold on to our values of Mutual Respect, Integrity, Commitment and Excellence.
postedCompany.name: PRECURSOR ASSURANCE LLP

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
